name: distorm3

metadata.name: distorm3
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: The goal of diStorm3 is to decode x86/AMD64 binary streams and return a structure that describes each instruction.

documentation:
Powerful Disassembler Library For AMD64
by Gil Dabah (distorm@gmail.com)

Python bindings by Mario Vilas (mvilas@gmail.com)

modules.name: python.distorm3.__main__
documentation: Based on work by Mario Vilas, http://breakingcode.wordpress.com, licensed under BSD in 2016

modules.name: setup
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

modules.name: python.distorm3
documentation: :[diStorm3}: Python binding
Based on diStorm64 Python binding by Mario Vilas
Initial support for decompose API added by Roee Shenberg
Licensed under BSD in 2016.
Compatible with Python2.x and 3.x.

classes.name: python.distorm3.FlowControl
documentation:
The flow control instruction will be flagged in the lo byte of the 'meta' field in _InstInfo of diStorm.
They are used to distinguish between flow control instructions (such as: ret, call, jmp, jz, etc) to normal ones.
TODO: put FlowControlFlags together in one class with _repr_.

modules.name: python.test_distorm3
documentation: Gil Dabah 2006
Tests for diStorm3

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.Inst.check_simple_deref
documentation:
Checks whether a (simple) memory dereference type is used, size of deref is in ops.size.
Displacement is ignored in this check.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.Inst.check_deref
documentation:
Checks whether a memory dereference type is used, size of deref is in ops.size.
Base registers is in inst.base.
Displacement is ignored in this check.

classes.name: python.test_distorm3.TestInstTable
documentation:
Check that locate_inst algorithm covers all opcode-length (ol)
for the varying sizes of opcodes.
The bad tests should not find an instruction, so they should fail on purpose,
to see we don't crash the diassembler.
Also test for some end-cases with nop and wait.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_reps
documentation: Scas and cmps have different repZ prefix.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_stos
documentation: STOS instruction is treated specially with certain prefixes, check all such cases.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_scas
documentation: SCAS instruction is treated specially with certain prefixes, check all such cases.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_lods
documentation: LODS instruction is treated specially with certain prefixes, check all such cases.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_movs
documentation: MOVS instruction is treated specially with certain prefixes, check all such cases.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_cmps
documentation: CMPS instruction is treated specially with certain prefixes, check all such cases.

methods.name: python.test_distorm3.TestPrefixes.test_last_segment
documentation:
Only last segment is used as a prefix.
Check tricky 64 bits too for default overrides.
